# thoth_browser_policies (Data Source)

Reads browser policies with optional provider filter.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `provider_name` (String) Optional browser provider filter.

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Browser policy rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total policies returned.
